data.name: Hentai World Wild
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a captivating and soothing puzzle adventure where every completed stage reveals breathtaking, alluring images of beautiful girl. Bask in the serene ambiance enhanced by gentle background music as you skillfully piece each puzzle together. Swap and arrange tiles with precision to uncover the full image, advancing through levels that grow more challenging and rewarding.

With no ticking clock, you’re free to play at your own pace, savoring the satisfaction of each finished puzzle. Whether you’re a casual player or a puzzle enthusiast, this game offers a charming blend of challenge, relaxation, and beautifull picture.

Features:

Unlock stunning and seductive images of girl with every level you complete.

Relax to soft, calming background music that enriches the experience.

View the complete image in full-screen mode after solving the puzzle.

Progress through a variety of levels with steadily increasing difficulty.

No time pressure—play, relax, and enjoy at your own rhythm.

data.short_description: A relaxing puzzle game where each completed stage unveils stunning images of beautiful girls, set to gentle music with increasing challenges.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
